manual_ip.title: Enter IP address
manual_ip.subtitle: No spa found automatically. Please enter the IP address of your Intex PureSpa manually. You can find the IP address in your router or in the Intex app.
manual_ip.fail: ✗ No response from spa. Make sure the spa is powered on and on the same network.
manual_ip.fail_continue: Click Add again to continue anyway.
manual_ip.enter_ip: Please enter an IP address first
